content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of the sync/import safety rules implementation. The changes add: (1) br_health.rs with JSONL health checks detecting conflict markers, malformed records, and missing files; (2) sync_import support in BrMutationAdapter with proper dirty-state guards; (3) sync_if_dirty convenience method with recovered-mutation tracking; (4) pre-operation health checks in service.rs and success_reconciliation.rs; (5) file-level locking via flock for cross-process serialization; (6) comprehensive test coverage. The implementation is correct, well-structured, and handles crash recovery properly. clippy and fmt pass clean. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
